title: Review the uncommitted changes. Context: # Coder Handoff ## Task Review failed: review score 4/10 (min 7) issues to fix: - Then list up to 5 concrete fix items, one per line, using numbered or '-' bullets. - If score >= 7, do not include an issues list. - Format your final line EXACTLY as: SCORE: N/...
summary_text: ISSUES TO FIX: - Redact or stop committing raw `taskSummary` telemetry in the tracked experience logs; this diff adds internal email content, org IDs, SSH aliases, and shell/session output to the repo, e.g. [handover](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/handover/experience.jsonl#L530), [fugue](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/fugue/experience.jsonl#L211), and [orchestra-delegator](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/experience.jsonl#L1109). - Remove machine-local state from version control and ignore it; [bookkeeping `.project-init-status`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/.claude/.project-init-status#L1), [worker `.project-init-status`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-worker/.claude/.project-init-status#L1), and [`.fugue-managed-notebooklm`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/notebooklm-shared/.fugue-managed-notebooklm#L1) only store per-machine counters, timestamps, and absolute paths, so they will create constant churn. - Expand ignore coverage; [.gitignore](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.gitignore#L1) only adds `.canon/`, but the working tree still has large generated/untracked trees like `.claude/`, `.project-os/`, `assets/skills/*/correction-pairs/`, and `assets/skills/*/golden-store/`, which keeps the repo one accidental add away from another noisy commit. - Align the new Keychain fallback in [freee-client.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L155) with the existing bookkeeping credential naming in [bookkeeping-env.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/bookkeeping-env.sh#L22); looking up `freee-client-id` / `freee-client-secret` instead of `FREEE_CLIENT_ID` / `FREEE_CLIENT_SECRET` makes previously provisioned secrets invisible. SCORE: 5/10
